mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS submissionId, s.problem_id AS problemId, s.problem_title AS problemTitle, s.language, s.code, s.status AS result, s.pass_count AS passCount, s.total_count AS totalCount, s.run_time AS runTime, s.memory, s.error_msg AS errorMsg, s.submit_time AS submitTime FROM submission s WHERE s.id = #{submissionId} AND s.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO submission ( user_id, problem_id, problem_title, language, code, status, pass_count, total_count, run_time, memory, error_msg, submit_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{problemId}, #{problemTitle}, #{language}, #{code}, #{status}, #{passCount}, #{totalCount}, #{runTime}, #{memory}, #{errorMsg}, #{submitTime}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM submission WHERE problem_id = #{problemId} AND status = 0
